talks.title: Data Cinematography in Immersive Contexts
talks.description: Invited speaker on directing data the way a cinematographer directs a scene, with a focus on what changes when the audience can move through the frame.

talks.title: The Health of Nations (1950–2050)
talks.description: Three-act data-cinematic presentation spanning a century of demographic and public-health data across all countries.

talks.title: The Health of Nations — Saudi Ministry of Health
talks.description: Presented to ~200 senior leaders at the Saudi Ministry of Health.

talks.title: Airshow: Post-PowerPoint Storytelling
talks.description: Stage piece with Horace Dediu on data cinematography as a craft, presented to an audience of senior engineers.

talks.title: Airshow Tour (with Horace Dediu)
talks.venue: Boston · Tokyo · Vancouver · London · San Francisco · Helsinki · Seattle · Melbourne
talks.description: Multi-stop tour applying data-cinematic methods to the Apple market narrative.

talks.title: Distributed Object Manager
talks.description: GTE Labs research on distributed-object systems in the Modula-3 lineage.
